en: Select a cell effect, then click or drag it onto an active cell.
zh_CN: 选择一个格子效果后，点击或拖到已激活格子上。

en: Leave the board edit panel with these pending edits?
zh_CN: 带着这些待提交的格子调整离开面板？

en: These edits stay pending after you leave. Cell effect items are consumed only when battle starts.
zh_CN: 离开后这些调整会保持待提交状态。格子效果道具只会在进入战斗时消耗。
